'''gafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:womanlily|womanlily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:womanlily|womanlily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gafate|gafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafatesher|gafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafatesherĂ«m|gafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafatero|gafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafateshĂ«|gafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafateshĂ«m|gafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafatero|gokigafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafateshĂ«|gokigafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafateshĂ«m|gokigafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafankerom|gogafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafankeshĂ«|gogafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafankeshĂ«m|gogafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafankeya|gogafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafaterom|gafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafatemu|gafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafateya|gafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafaterom|gokigafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafatemu|gokigafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafateya|gokigafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafafate|gafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafafatesher|gafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafafatesherĂ«m|gafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafafatero|gafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafafateshĂ«|gafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafafateshĂ«m|gafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafafatero|gokigafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafafateshĂ«|gokigafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafafateshĂ«m|gokigafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafafankerom|gogafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafafankeshĂ«|gogafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafafankeshĂ«m|gogafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafafankeya|gogafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafafaterom|gafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafafatemu|gafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafafateya|gafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafafaterom|gokigafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafafatemu|gokigafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafafateya|gokigafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠte|gĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠtesher|gĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠtero|gĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠfĂŠtero|gokigĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠfĂŠteya|gĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠfĂŠterom|gokigĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠfĂŠteya|gokigĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafafte|gafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafaftesher|gafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafaftesherĂ«m|gafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafaftero|gafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafafteshĂ«|gafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafafteshĂ«m|gafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafaftero|gokigafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafafteshĂ«|gokigafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafafteshĂ«m|gokigafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafafnkerom|gogafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafafnkeshĂ«|gogafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafafnkeshĂ«m|gogafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafafnkeya|gogafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafafterom|gafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafaftemu|gafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafafteya|gafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafafterom|gokigafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafaftemu|gokigafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafafteya|gokigafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
